title: Gentle Balance
subtitle: Finding comfort in small routines
description: At this stage, nausea may still be present, but your body may begin to adjust slightly. Introducing small variety in meals while keeping them light and regular can help maintain nourishment and comfort.
what_to_expect: Small improvements in appetite at times
Ability to tolerate a little more variety in food
nutrition_focus: Continue with small and frequent meals
Gradually include a bit more variety if comfortable
recommended_foods: Light meals like khichdi, dal-rice, and vegetable porridge
Fruits like banana, apple, papaya, or orange
Cooked vegetables like bottle gourd, pumpkin, and carrots
Protein sources like curd, lentils, paneer, or eggs (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals during low appetite phases
hydration: Sip water regularly throughout the day
Include coconut water, buttermilk, or light soups
reassurance: Slowly adding variety while keeping meals simple can support your comfort and energy.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining steady and small meals helps support stable energy levels.
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Regular and balanced meals help maintain stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Continuing iron-rich foods in small portions supports your energy levels.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent small steps in nutrition help build strength.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced and light meals support comfort and stable blood pressure.
hypertension.reassurance: Simple and steady meals help maintain balance.

thyroid.personalized_description: Maintaining consistent eating patterns supports overall balance.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency and gradual changes support your body.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, maintaining small, balanced, and regular meals with gradual variety can help support your needs.
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Gentle progress in your diet can support both comfort and well-being.
